title: Feather remake
description: Feather Client is a lightweight client-side mod that adds customizable HUDs, smooth Freelook, Zoom, Fullbright, and more — all toggleable via a clean settings screen. Designed for PvP and casual players who want performance and customization without bloat.
body:
[![FAST](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3e81436885d7d199d80ffde632b0895d24a2c72b.png)](https://fastclient.net/ashmeetop)


🪶 Feather Remake
Feather Remake client is a minimal and customizable client-side Fabric mod for Minecraft 1.21.5 It adds a clean mod menu, customizable HUDs, Freelook, Zoom, Fullbright, and other useful utilities — all toggleable with a polished interface.

🎛️ Custom Mod Menu UI
Press Right Shift to open a modern toggle screen

Enable/disable HUDs and features like Zoom, FullBright, Freelook

Clean layout with Minecraft-style buttons

Press Right Alt to reposition HUDs with drag & drop

✨ Features
📊 Toggleable HUDs

FPS, CPS, Coordinates, Armor, and Potion Effects

Clean layout, adjustable position

No server-side impact

🔭 Zoom Feature

OptiFine-like smooth zoom

Toggleable with keybinds

🧭 Freelook (optional)

Rotate camera freely (like Lunar Client)

💡 FullBright

Brightens dark areas using Night Vision

Hidden icon, zero visual clutter

🧩 Custom UI Screens

Right Shift opens feature toggles

Right Alt opens HUD editor

🧩 Compatibility
✅ Minecraft 1.21.5

✅ Fabric Loader

✅ Client-side only

✅ Compatible with other HUD/utility mods

🧰 Installation
Install Fabric Loader

Place featherclient-x.x.x.jar into your mods folder

Launch the game and press Right Shift to toggle features

💬 Credits
Made by Ashmeet
💬 join the community
https://discord.gg/WnzS6VeQzC
